description_long: This object is a flat-screen computer monitor with a rectangular display framed by a moderately thick, matte black bezel. The front features a wide, dark screen with a subtle ASUS logo centered on the lower bezel, and a small HDMI label on the left. The rear panel is slightly recessed and displays a large, embossed ASUS logo, along with a label strip containing technical information. The monitor is supported by a circular pedestal stand, which is broad and stable, connecting to the back of the screen via a short, sturdy neck. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with a smooth, hard finish, and the design is minimalistic with no visible buttons or ports on the front or sides. The monitor is typical of those found in offices, homes, or public urban spaces such as libraries or information kiosks.
description: A flat-screen ASUS computer monitor with a matte black bezel, circular pedestal stand, and a smooth, minimalistic design. The front features a wide display and subtle branding, while the rear has an embossed logo and technical label.
description_view_0: The front view shows the wide, dark display framed by a matte black bezel, with the ASUS logo and HDMI label visible at the bottom.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the monitor's slim profile and the circular base, with no visible buttons or ports.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the large, embossed ASUS logo, a technical label, and the attachment point of the stand.
description_view_3: The right side view again emphasizes the thinness of the monitor and the round stand, with no visible controls or ports.
attribute_screen_bezel_design: The bezel is moderately thick, matte black, with a smooth finish and subtle branding. It has straight edges and slightly rounded corners, with no decorative elements or color contrast.
attribute_stand_type: The stand is a circular pedestal base made of black plastic, connected to the monitor by a short, solid neck. It appears stable and non-adjustable, with a simple, functional design.
attribute_button_placement: No physical buttons or controls are visible on the front, sides, or rear of the monitor in the provided images.
attribute_brand_logo: The ASUS brand logo is present in two locations: centered on the lower front bezel in white, and embossed in large letters on the rear panel.
